chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 2462 of 2023 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________ 1. For order in MA No. 13056/2023 2. For hearing of Bail Application 23-11-2023 Mr. Abdul Nasir Advocate for the applicant Mr. Altaf Ahmed Sahar, Assistant Attorney General for Federation of Pakistan Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General for the State Mr. Qaim Deen Director, Commission Afghan Refugee Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. Two persons (Saleh and Zikarullah) have filed this bail application. Saleh was granted bail on 16.11.2023. NADRA has now also confirmed that the Afghan Citizen which is in possession of the applicant, Zikarullah is a genuine card and that his details exist in the NADRA database. Ministry of SAFRON from time to time, increases the period of stay of those who have been issued the Afghan Citizen Card. The Ministry of SAFRON has repeatedly been requested to provide the Court with a clear-cut policy of the Government of Pakistan in this regard, however, none has been provided to date. There appears to be a lack of clarity in this regard. Be that as it may, persons who have been allowed to remain lawfully in Pakistan cannot be held behind bars indefinitely due to the apathy of the Government, especially when they have not committed any crime. Zikarullah is admitted to post-arrest bail against a surety of a Rs. 2,000 P.R. Bond to the satisfaction of the lerned trial court. JUDGE Amjad PS
